parameters.content:
# Error Notifier Workflow
# =======================
# Receives error events from the Lead Gen System workflow.
# Sends formatted alerts to Slack with execution details and error context.
#
# SETUP:
# 1. Set this workflow's ID as the errorWorkflow in the Lead Gen System
# 2. Configure Slack webhook URL or Slack API credential
# 3. Set the target Slack channel
